name: Hearty Fish Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (10 1/2 oz.) condensed cream of potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish fillets into 1 1/2-inch squares.
2. Fry the bacon until crisp. Remove from the pan and drain on paper towels.
3. Add the onions, beans, water, salt, rosemary, and thyme to the drippings in the pan.
4. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Add the fish and cover. Simmer gently until the fish flakes easily (10-15 minutes).
6. Add the tomatoes and carrots.
7. Combine the remaining ingredients: add the condensed cream of potatoes, milk, and half and half.
8. Mix and stir into the fish mixture.
9. Heat to serving temperature.
10. Sprinkle the bacon on top before serving.
